testcase.name: E2E Test Suite › Purchase 2 item
testcase.system-out:
Before all tests Executing step 1: Login_valid Executing step: Login_valid This is a login step. Attempting login with username: standard_user Executing step 2: AddToCart_Sauce Labs Bike Light_Sauce Labs Backpack Executing step: AddToCart_Sauce Labs Bike Light_Sauce Labs Backpack This is an add to cart step. This is an add to cart step. [ [32m'Sauce Labs Bike Light'[39m, [32m'Sauce Labs Backpack'[39m ] Executing step 3: viewCart Executing step: viewCart This is a view cart step. [ [32m'Sauce Labs Bike Light'[39m, [32m'Sauce Labs Backpack'[39m ] Checking in the cart item:Sauce Labs Bike Light Checking in the cart item:Sauce Labs Backpack Executing step 4: checkout Executing step: checkout [ [32m'Angel'[39m, [32m'Schuster'[39m, [32m'79211'[39m ] Executing step 5: Logout Executing step: Logout This is a logout step. Attempting logout with username: standard_user End of steps reached!
[[ATTACHMENT|..\..\test-results\e2e-e2e-E2E-Test-Suite-Purchase-2-item-chromium\trace.zip]]

testcase.name: E2E Test Suite › Invalid Login
testcase.system-out:
Before all tests Executing step 1: Login_invalidUsername Executing step: Login_invalidUsername This is a login step. Attempting Login with invalidUsername End of steps reached!
